wordplay_note: The ruler who cannot rule the future
card_description: Rick (Frederick) (meaning "Rick = ruler (Germanic)") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The World Jones Made*. Protagonist living under a one-world government where Jones predicts the future. Name note: The ruler who cannot rule the future. Free agency under determinism — how to act when the future is known. First appears in *The World Jones Made*.

reference.brief: Protagonist living under a one-world government where Jones predicts the future
reference.significance: Free agency under determinism — how to act when the future is known
